items.title: Graham Seed Fund
items.description: The Graham Seed Fund (GSF) supports research at the University of Waterloo that addresses critical health care challenges through interdisciplinary collaboration with clinicians and health providers.

items.title: Joint CityUHK–UW Seed Fund
items.description: The Seed Fund aims to foster collaborative research between City University of Hong Kong (CityUHK) and the University of Waterloo (UW).

items.title: LITE Seed Grant
items.deadline_source: Application Deadline: (2 annually): June 1st, and October 1st
items.description: LITE Seed Grants can help you investigate small-scale teaching and learning research projects and attend activities to develop your instructional skills.
